sentences.target: Ferme bien la barrière du jardin.

translations.fr: Ferme bien la barrière du jardin.
translations.es: Cierra bien la puerta del jardín.
translations.it: Chiudi bene il cancello del giardino.
translations.pt: Feche bem o portão do jardim.
translations.hu: Zárd be rendesen a kerti kaput.
translations.hi: बगीचे का दरवाज़ा ठीक से बंद करो.
translations.el: Κλείσε σωστά την πόρτα του κήπου.
translations.ja: 庭の門をきちんと閉めてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular main verb; orders the action of closing.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating manner/intensity of the action.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun (feminine), head of the noun phrase serving as direct object of the verb.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and the article 'le'; introduces a noun complement specifying possession/location.
Common noun (masculine), complement of 'barrière' introduced by 'du'.

sentences.target: On pousse la barrière pour passer.

translations.fr: On pousse la barrière pour passer.
translations.en: We push the barrier to get through.
translations.de: Wir drücken das Gatter, um durchzukommen.
translations.he: אנחנו דוחפים את המחסום כדי לעבור.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đẩy cổng để đi qua.
translations.nl: We duwen het hek open om erdoor te gaan.
translations.hi: हम पार जाने के लिए बैरियर को धक्का देते हैं.
translations.el: Σπρώχνουμε το εμπόδιο για να περάσουμε.
translations.nb: Vi dytter sperringen for å komme gjennom.
translations.sv: Vi puttar på grinden för att komma igenom.
translations.da: Vi skubber til lågen for at komme igennem.
translations.ja: 通り抜けるために柵を押します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; syntactic subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'pousse'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of 'pour', expressing purpose.

sentences.target: La barrière se lève doucement au péage.
sentences.reading: /la baʁjɛʁ sə lɛv dusəmɑ̃ o peaʒ/

translations.fr: La barrière se lève doucement au péage.
translations.ipa: /la baʁjɛʁ sə lɛv dusəmɑ̃ o peaʒ/
translations.en: The barrier rises slowly at the toll booth.
translations.es: La barrera se levanta lentamente en el peaje.
translations.de: Die Schranke hebt sich langsam an der Mautstelle.
translations.it: La sbarra si alza lentamente al casello.
translations.zh-Hans: 收费站的闸杆慢慢升起。
translations.yue: 收費站嘅閘杆慢慢升起。
translations.ru: На пункте оплаты шлагбаум медленно поднимается.
translations.pt: A cancela se levanta lentamente na praça de pedágio.
translations.vi: Thanh chắn nâng lên từ từ tại trạm thu phí.
translations.ar: الحاجز يرتفع ببطء عند محطة الرسوم.
translations.nl: De slagboom gaat langzaam omhoog bij de tolpoort.
translations.uk: На пункті оплати шлагбаум повільно підіймається.
translations.hu: A sorompó lassan felemelkedik a fizetőkapunál.
translations.hi: टोल बूथ पर बैरियर धीरे-धीरे ऊपर उठता है.
translations.pl: Szlaban powoli się podnosi na bramce poboru opłat.
translations.el: Η μπάρα ανεβαίνει αργά στο σταθμό διοδίων.
translations.nb: Bommen hever seg sakte ved bomstasjonen.
translations.id: Palang naik perlahan di gerbang tol.
translations.ro: Bariera se ridică încet la stația de taxare.
translations.cs: Závora se u mýtné brány pomalu zvedá.
translations.da: Bommen løfter sig langsomt ved betalingsanlægget.
translations.ja: 料金所で遮断機がゆっくり上がる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Common noun (feminine), head of the subject noun phrase.
Reflexive clitic pronoun; part of the pronominal verb 'se lever', marking a mediopassive/reflexive construction.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive within pronominal construction 'se lève'.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating manner.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing a locative complement.
Common noun (masculine), head of the prepositional phrase indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous attendons devant la barrière de sécurité.
sentences.reading: /nu zatɑ̃dɔ̃ dəvɑ̃ la baʁjɛʁ də sekyʁite/

translations.fr: Nous attendons devant la barrière de sécurité.
translations.ipa: /nu zatɑ̃dɔ̃ dəvɑ̃ la baʁjɛʁ də sekyʁite/
translations.en: We wait in front of the security barrier.
translations.es: Esperamos delante de la valla de seguridad.
translations.it: Aspettiamo davanti alla barriera di sicurezza.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在安全护栏前等候。
translations.yue: 我哋喺安全欄杆前等候。
translations.pt: Esperamos em frente à barreira de segurança.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chờ trước rào chắn an ninh.
translations.hi: हम सुरक्षा बैरियर के सामने इंतजार करते हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε μπροστά από το φράγμα ασφαλείας.
translations.id: Kami menunggu di depan pagar pengaman.
translations.ro: Așteptăm în fața barierei de securitate.
translations.ja: 私たちはセキュリティバリケードの前で待ちます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun in the prepositional phrase.
Common noun (feminine), head of the noun phrase governed by 'devant'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying type.
Common noun (feminine), complement of 'barrière' with 'de' specifying the kind of barrier.
